ORDER GRANTING APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BMW FINANCIAL SERVICES NA, INC., A DELAWARE CORP HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VISCARRA, LUIS POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 1989 BMW 325IS, VIN # WBAAA2300K4258813, VLN #2KYZ770, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $16,039.56 DAMAGES, $918.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,957.56, PLUS INTEREST OF $2583.91 LESS PAYMENTS OF $1400.00, PLUS $4.39 PER DAY FROM 28-FEB-97 TO ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. ADDITIONAL TERMS- SEE FULL TEXT OF JUDGMENT ON FILE.
